---
title: "Education"
output: html_document
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

body {
  background: #fafafa;
}

.education-page {
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 56px 24px 72px;
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  color: #1f2933;
}

.edu-hero {
  margin-bottom: 38px;
  padding: 34px 38px;
  border-radius: 28px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f7f1e8 0%, #eef4ff 52%, #ffffff 100%);
  border: 1px solid rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.12);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
}

.edu-kicker {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #7c5c2e;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.edu-title {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
  font-size: 3.5rem;
  line-height: 1.05;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 14px;
  color: #111827;
}

.edu-summary {
  max-width: 800px;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: #4b5563;
  margin: 0;
}

.edu-timeline {
  position: relative;
  margin-top: 34px;
  padding-left: 28px;
}

.edu-timeline::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 9px;
  top: 6px;
  bottom: 6px;
  width: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #1d4ed8, #0f766e, #b08968);
  border-radius: 99px;
}

.edu-card {
  position: relative;
  margin-bottom: 26px;
  padding: 28px 30px;
  border-radius: 24px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.28);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 35px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.07);
}

.edu-card::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: -25px;
  top: 34px;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 4px solid #1d4ed8;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(29, 78, 216, 0.13);
}

.edu-card.ms::before {
  border-color: #0f766e;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.13);
}

.edu-card.bs::before {
  border-color: #b08968;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(176, 137, 104, 0.13);
}

.edu-topline {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 18px;
  align-items: flex-start;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.edu-degree {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
  font-size: 1.85rem;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #111827;
  margin: 0;
}

.edu-date {
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #6b7280;
  background: #f3f4f6;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 7px 13px;
}

.edu-school {
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #374151;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.edu-description {
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: #4b5563;
  margin: 0 0 14px;
}

.edu-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-top: 14px;
}

.edu-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 7px 11px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.35);
  color: #475569;
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

@media (max-width: 720px) {
  .education-page {
    padding: 36px 16px 56px;
  }

  .edu-hero {
    padding: 28px 24px;
  }

  .edu-title {
    font-size: 2.45rem;
  }

  .edu-topline {
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .edu-date {
    white-space: normal;
  }

  .edu-card {
    padding: 24px 22px;
  }
}
</style>

<main class="education-page">

<section class="edu-hero">
  <div class="edu-kicker">Academic Training</div>
  <h1 class="edu-title">Education</h1>
  <p class="edu-summary">
    My academic training spans biostatistics, statistical genetics, pharmacology, genome biology, and mathematics.
    I am currently a PhD student at Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence, supervised by
    Dr. Jun Wen and Dr. Eduardo Beltrame.
  </p>
</section>

<section class="edu-timeline">

<article class="edu-card phd">
  <div class="edu-topline">
    <h2 class="edu-degree">Doctor of Philosophy</h2>
    <div class="edu-date">Current</div>
  </div>
  <div class="edu-school">
    Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence · Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
  </div>
  <p class="edu-description">
    I am pursuing doctoral research at the intersection of artificial intelligence, biomedical informatics,
    pharmacogenomics, single-cell omics, and multi-omics integration. My PhD training is supervised by
    Dr. Jun Wen and Dr. Eduardo Beltrame.
  </p>
  <div class="edu-tags">
    <span class="edu-tag">Artificial Intelligence</span>
    <span class="edu-tag">Pharmacogenomics</span>
    <span class="edu-tag">Single-cell Omics</span>
    <span class="edu-tag">Multi-omics Integration</span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="edu-card ms">
  <div class="edu-topline">
    <h2 class="edu-degree">Master of Science in Biostatistics</h2>
    <div class="edu-date">Sep. 2023 – May 2025</div>
  </div>
  <div class="edu-school">
    Columbia University · New York, United States
  </div>
  <p class="edu-description">
    I completed my M.S. in Biostatistics with a concentration in Statistical Genetics and a GPA of 3.94/4.00.
    My graduate training strengthened my foundation in statistical modeling, genetic epidemiology,
    computational data analysis, and biomedical research methodology.
  </p>
  <div class="edu-tags">
    <span class="edu-tag">Biostatistics</span>
    <span class="edu-tag">Statistical Genetics</span>
    <span class="edu-tag">Statistical Modeling</span>
    <span class="edu-tag">Biomedical Data Science</span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="edu-card bs">
  <div class="edu-topline">
    <h2 class="edu-degree">Honours Bachelor of Science</h2>
    <div class="edu-date">Sep. 2018 – Jun. 2022</div>
  </div>
  <div class="edu-school">
    University of Toronto · Toronto, Canada
  </div>
  <p class="edu-description">
    I completed an Honours Bachelor of Science with a Specialist in Pharmacology, a Major in Genome Biology,
    and a Minor in Mathematics. This interdisciplinary training provided the biological and quantitative foundation
    for my current research interests in computational genetics, genomics, and precision medicine.
  </p>
  <div class="edu-tags">
    <span class="edu-tag">Pharmacology</span>
    <span class="edu-tag">Genome Biology</span>
    <span class="edu-tag">Mathematics</span>
    <span class="edu-tag">Precision Medicine</span>
  </div>
</article>

</section>

</main>
```
